allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('twitter'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('instagram'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('face'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('youtube'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('linked'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('social'\)\); console.log\(keys\);")
